programme.title: The Warrant: Breaker's Law
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal John Breaker and his deputy ride to a town held hostage by a ruthless gang as they transport a prisoner through the West. With the fate of a community at stake, they must decide if they will abandon the town or make a stand for justice.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - Virginia: Host Taylor Hicks heads to Virginia for a State Plate stunner that brings to light not one, but three entrees, along with an appetizer and dessert. Virginia has a plentiful peanut crop, so Taylor follows their journey from field to table with an appetizer of peanut soup. Then, 10,000 miles of shoreline leads him to the first entrée: a surprisingly entertaining fish known as the sugar toad. There's no way Taylor can pass up the second entrée: a helping of Virginia country ham. Virginia is also known as the flounder capital of the world, so Taylor heads to its eastern shore for the third entrée of bronzed flounder. When it's time for dessert, Colonial Williamsburg serves Taylor a hefty dose of history in a sweet mug of colonial chocolate.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - Indiana: Taylor heads to Indiana, known for its farmland, Americana and sports. First stop, county-fair comfort food: corn dogs. Taylor tries being a dog “dipper” with local cornmeal batter before digging in. He then heads from fair food to fine fare with an entree of one of the Hoosier State's top products: duck. Taylor helps cook a succulent duck breast served atop duck confit, cooked with “liquid gold” (duck fat) and topped with duck sauce, a gourmet treat. Then it's off to the farm for world class fresh corn on the cob, a picnic favorite. Plus, he'll make time for Indiana's “other” iconic crop, tomatoes, turned into a tasty side freshly stewed. And for dessert, Taylor helps make a depression era staple, sugar cream pie with a little sweet, a little dairy and a lot of love.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Bladesmithing, Woodworking and Leather Bags: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. First, she travels to a remote area of Alaska to meet husband-and-wife Master Bladesmiths Adam and Haley DesRosiers, who make some of the world's most sought after knives. Then, she heads to Hickory, North Carolina, to meet Master Woodworker Eddie Hamrick, a world-renowned craftsman who can make just about anything out of wood. Finally, Jill is off to Austin, Texas, to meet Cambria Harkey, a leatherworker whose beautiful handbags are appreciated by everyday folks and red-carpet celebrities.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Wood Pens, Leather Boots and Doors: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. Her first stop is Joliet, Illinois, where Chad and Jessica Schumacher of Allegory Pens are turning scraps of wood with historical significance into stunning writing instruments. Next, Jill meets up with former Oklahoma cowboy crooner, Michael Wayne Brooks, who moved to Los Angeles to make and sell his elaborate hand-stitched cowboy boots. Finally, it's off to Santa Fe, New Mexico, where Scott and Melissa Coleman of La Puerta Originals are creating new appreciation for long-forgotten doors.

programme.title: Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Filet of Dreams: Bubba's in a pinch when Cody urges him to ease his aching back with acupuncture. Cody and Misty have to find out why their herd is losing so many stillborn calves before it threatens their new business. Booger discovers the ups and downs of “daddy duty” when he takes care of Matthew for the day. He draws on the bonding time he had with his own grandfather to make a special new memory. The cowboys put their steakhouse dreams on the line to recruit a business partner and are confronted with their next steps: developing a full menu and creating a “pop-up” restaurant.

programme.title: Tidewater Diaries

Together, they unravel the secrets behind Captain Nick's legendary status, sharing thrilling tales of swordfish expeditions on the open seas. The episode not only explores the intricacies of swordfishing techniques but also delves into the rich history of Bud & Mary's Marina. Through a nostalgic lens, Captain C.A. and Captain Nick vividly depict the marina's origins, capturing the essence of its enduring significance in maritime culture.

programme.title: Beyond The Surface

From wildlife encounters to thrilling fishing expeditions, witness the beauty and excitement of this serene locale on Beyond the Surface TV. Join them as they delve deep into the heart of nature, sharing stories and insights that highlight the unique charm of Orange Lake and its significance as a haven for outdoor enthusiasts. Don't miss this unforgettable journey through the hidden treasures of one of Florida's most picturesque destinations.

programme.title: Beyond The Surface

With expert tips, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable moments, this fishing adventure promises excitement and inspiration for anglers of all levels. Tune in to witness the excitement unfold on the waters of the Econfina River and the Gulf Coast with Danny Allen and Greg Devault!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: When Emma accidentally causes Olivia to lose an important science prize, a furious Olivia breaks off her friendship with Emma and the other Friends. But after a New Year's Eve dream, in which a living, breathing Zobo takes her on a tour of her past, present and potential future, Olivia is reminded that friendship is the most valuable prize of all. Today is the most important day of Olivia's life. Not because tonight is New Year's Eve, but it's also the day of the annual Robotics Challenge, when teen scientists compete to build the best robot and win a full university scholarship. Olivia has spent the whole year preparing her entry: an all-new, high-tech, flying Aviator Zobo. It's a sure winner – until Emma accidentally sabotages it and wins the trophy herself! Furious, Olivia breaks off her friendship with Emma and the other Friends (for defending Emma), and stomps out in tears. That night, in a dream, a living, breathing Aviator Zobo takes her on a tour of her life – past, present and potential future – to remind her that friendship is the most valuable prize of all.

programme.title: The Day Ninjago Stood Still
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer's toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness' and seizes control of the Stone Army. Scales finally takes leadership over the Serpentine and plans to burrow beneath Ninjago City to level it to the ground. But as they burrow, they run into a lost chamber holding the rest of the Stone Army. The Devourer's toxic venom in the ground brings the Stone Army to life, sealing the Serpentine in their tomb, and returning the snakes back to where they were first found. On the Dark Island, the Overlord directs Lord Garmadon to a giant celestial clock. Garmadon removes a ‘Helmet of Darkness', which will grant the wearer control over the Stone Army, and also activate the clock to tick down to when the final battle will begin. Back in Ninjago City, the indestructible Stone Army surfaces and attacks, and the Ninja know the only thing they can do is to save as many people as they can. They manage to barely escape with other townspeople, only for the Destiny's Bounty's engines to get damaged. In the end, Lord Garmadon arrives with the helmet, and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: Kingdom Of Heroes
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form. Can the NEXO-Knights and Merlok 2.0 stop the greatest threat they've ever faced? Or will the kingdom be plunged into darkness…forever. The Redoubt of Ruination readies the final ceremony to call forth MONSTRUX, the arch-necromancer of the past. Clay, holding the Book of Betrayal walks to the gates of the spooky place. Inside, Clay hears strange…singing and music. It's like a twisted Broadway show of some kind. Meanwhile, the Knights all realize Clay is gone and so is the Book of Betrayal. Macy says Clay must be up to something. They have to trust him and, more importantly, they have to find him. At the Redoubt of Ruination the ceremony has already begun! The Book of Monsters wants the final ceremony that calls forth Monstrux to be like a really great show! The BOM then barfs up all the BOOKS OF EVIL into their places around Jestro. He's just missing the BOOK OF BETRAYAL, which Clay has. Clay says he'll trade the book for Jestro. The BOM immediately agrees to the deal and sets Jestro free. Then, Monsters grab-up Clay, restrain him, and put him in Jestro's place on the sacrifice stone. From outside, they're interrupted by the sounds of battle the Knights have arrived on the Fortrex and are attacking the Redoubt of Ruination. In the confusion, Jestro slips away. The BOM lets loose with a powerful protection spell to keep the Knights out as he starts with the ceremony…he's going to bring Monstrux out and remanifest him in Clay's body! Jestro is able to escape the Redoubt and make his way to the Knights, who can't seem to battle their way in. It's a race against time as the Knights try to get in and save Clay. As the Knights get in, they see that the crazy BOM is absorbing all the Books of Evil, one-by-one. He grows BIGGER and BIGGER! Macy calls for NEXO-Power…but it's not enough! The gigantic Book of Monsters sucks down the final book, the Book of Betrayal! He looms over Clay, about to consume him, too, and make him into Monstrux! Suddenly, Robin appears carrying TECHKALIBER…he tosses it to Clay. Just as the huge Book of Monsters falls on Clay, he holds up Techkaliber and Merlok 2.0 is there…his full power in the sword. Clay sticks the sword into the Book of Monster's huge mouth. BOOM! There's a BIG, MAGICAL EXPLOSION! As we cut back inside, we see the Book of Monsters is gone. The Knights release Clay and he thanks them and Jestro for saving him. Jestro thanks them all for saving him and seeing the good in him. WE DISSOLVE TO: The JoustDome. In a final ceremony the King and Queen reward the knights and congratulate them for keeping the kingdom safe. There are speeches, happiness and friendship. And Jestro even does a bit that's funny. At the very end we see a hint of something…Monstrux and the Book of Monsters are still out there.

programme.title: The Last Voyage
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light' that can restore the Ninjas' elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship. The Stone Army and Lord Garmadon have disappeared, and our heroes can see the mysterious Dark Island off their coastline. Fearing Garmadon is up to no good, Sensei Wu has the whole team suit up to begin a journey to the Dark Island. Since the Bounty's engines are damaged, they plan to go by sea. Misako reveals her ancient scrolls state of a ‘Temple of Light' that could return the Ninja's elemental powers, and it could be found on the island. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon has the Army mining for more ‘Dark Matter', using it to build a Super-Weapon that will recreate Ninjago in a twisted evil way. When a storm hits at sea, our heroes are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like starfish that can eat through a ship) and are forced to find refuge on a lighthouse at sea. Inside, Zane discovers his inventor father, the Tinkerer, is alive! Together, they repair the Bounty so it can fly again, escaping a giant Leviathan, and soaring to the Dark Island ahead.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: The Island Of Darkness
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon's Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined. The Ninja camouflage the Bounty, creating a secret rebel base on the island. Misako says they must find the Temple of Light, because only when their elemental powers return, will they be strong enough to defeat the indestructible Stone Army. The Ninja search the dark, exotic island and come across Garmadon's compound, where they're building the Super-Weapon. The Ninja discover the Temple of Light is hidden at the highest peak of the island, and the Tinkerer aids their trek in creating a Drill Dozer so they can travel underground unnoticed. A final chase and battle takes place at the Temple of Light, as the Ninja solve the puzzle and harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd, who also becomes more powerful then he ever imagined. Their new abilities can destroy the indestructible Stone Warriors. Although Lord Garmadon finds this to be a setback, the Overlord reassures him darkness will prevail, as we end on seeing the Celestial Clock ticking down closer to zero.

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: The Last Hope
programme.desc: When the Ninjas' attempt to return Garmadon's ‘Helmet of Darkness' to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago. With the Overlord and Garmadon nearing completion of the Super-Weapon, Misako tells the group she thinks there could be one last chance at preventing Lloyd's final battle with his father. She believes if they can steal the helmet off Garmadon's head and return it to it's rightful perch on the Celestial Clock, it could stop the clock before it reaches zero, thus preventing the final battle from beginning. Dressed as Warriors, the Ninja escort their ‘captive' Misako to Garmadon, and the heroes see glimpses of the Super-Weapon being built. In a thrilling escape, Misako cleverly steals Garmadon's helmet, and they race to the Celestial Clock. Lloyd has a brief encounter with his father, and hesitates striking him. When they return the helmet to its rightful perch, they're one second too late, allowing the clock to reach zero, and for it to focus a beam of concentrated light from the sky into the Super-Weapon. Nya is taken hostage, as the others fall off a cliff, barely surviving the fall. The Ninja have failed -- the final battle has begun.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Return Of The Overlord
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body. Lord Garmadon witnesses the Super-Weapon come to life, revealing it to be ‘Garma-Tron', a giant moving cannon. His first test subject is Nya. Meanwhile, the heroes prepare for the final battle and sneak-attack Garmadon's compound…only to find it empty. The Super-Weapon is moving towards the coastline, where the cannon's range can reach Ninjago. On the way there, the Ninja must face off with Evil Nya, turned dark from the Super-Weapon. On the coastline, Lloyd battles his father atop Garma-Tron. The battle is fierce, but Lloyd fails at stopping his father from firing Garma-Tron, turning Jamanakai Village evil. Garmadon naively celebrates, not realizing he's undone the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possess his body. And as the Overlord continues to get more powerful, a hideous metamorphosis is taking place. Lloyd must fight the Overlord, and just when it looks like good will prevail, Lloyd is injured and thrown to the ground. In the end, the villains escape through a portal to Ninjago, and our heroes are abandoned on the island with no way home. And with the Green Ninja injured, it looks like all is lost. Evil has won.

programme.title: Rotten Luck
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox unleashes the Forbidden Power Ravaging Rot on Knighton! Turning everything into green gooey rot. But Robin has an awesome new invention that could help the NEXO KNIGHTS Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find a second Forbidden Power near the falling down Swamp Castle: RAVAGING ROT. With this power, they can make everything in the kingdom rot – food, vegetation, anything that grows or is natural. And that's exactly what they do! It's awful and makes everything stink. The Sculptor start to sculpt a portable HeadQuarter for his master, Jestro. Jestro expects it to be done when they return from ravaging the land. Axl is very concerned – he's into organic food ... and now food starts to rot. Merlok 2.0 and Ava are continuing to work on perfecting the COMBO NEXO Powers. We see display screens of MANY of the NEXO Powers. But there's a huge power consumption issue with these new-fangled combos. “I'll have to find an algorithmic power curve consumption solution, magic man,” says Ava. “I always just sort of choose them by, uh, feel.” “What do you feel like?” “Uh, a ham sandwich, a banana, and dragon fire,” responds Merlok. “That produced a combo with 2% efficiency,” says Ava. “This is why we have to actually THINK about and study perfec Combos. We need automatic power integration.” The Knights must stop Jestro from rotting all the food and living plant matter in Knighton and Axl leads the charge. But as they finally confront Jestro, who's trying to rot a field of beans near Fruitbridge, they're hit by his finally completed ROLLING HQ (the Sculptor is proud of the “artsy” elements.) … it's not exactly perfect though … he took the idea of Head Quarter a little too litteral and created a big head. Finally, in this conclusive battle where the knights get strapped on a rotting bridge, Clay emerges in a sleek, new BATTLE SUIT that Robin built for him because he was starting to have trouble moving around (the whole turning to stone thing.) It's smaller and more high-tech than the bigger Mechs of the past. Clay's able to drive Jestro off. Jestro, at the end of the episode, puts the Forbidden Power of Ravaging Rot into Mount Thunderstrox. Meanwhile, back at the Fortrex, Axl makes an organic food feast for all his fellow Knights.

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures Andy travels back in time to find a footprint of an allosaurus, a massive meat-eating dinosaur.

programme.title: The Demon Headmaster
programme.desc: The Demon Headmaster Dinah moves in with the Hunter's and hopes for a better life. But her school ruled by a demon headmaster!

programme.title: The Demon Headmaster
programme.desc: The Demon Headmaster The boys get suspicious of Dinah's state of mind when she breaks one of the headmaster's rules.

programme.title: The Demon Headmaster
programme.desc: The Demon Headmaster The Demon Headmaster's plans for Dinah are discovered - and SPLAT forms a counter-plan.

programme.title: The Demon Headmaster
programme.desc: The Demon Headmaster The latest craze is 'octopus dare' and junior computer brain of the year competition.

programme.title: The Demon Headmaster
programme.desc: The Demon Headmaster The Computer Director is using mind control, but Dinah doesn't understand why - yet.

programme.title: The Demon Headmaster
programme.desc: The Demon Headmaster Three of the Brains have disappeared, along with Ian. Dinah begins to catch on to what is happening.

programme.title: Show Me Show Me
programme.desc: Show Me Show Me Chris and Pui transform a bench and a bollard into robots, and find out how useful colanders are.

programme.title: Show Me Show Me
programme.desc: Show Me Show Me Chris, Pui and all the toys explore the outdoor world, and build a hide in the woods to spot blackbirds.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Duggee asks the Squirrels to help decorate the clubhouse and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels are out tobogganing with Duggee and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels find a treasure map inside Duggee's big shiny ruby and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Duggee decides to make an omelette, but there's no eggs and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels hear a spooky, echoey voice and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Foods that Melt
programme.desc: Watch foods melt before your eyes! Chill out as Lily tries to solve the mystery behind Baked Alaska, a frozen dessert that doesn't melt in the oven. Onthe hunt for a simple snack, Avery visits a local cheese shop and discovers there's moreto cheese than just cheddar! Back at the kitchen with Matt, Lily and Avery use a varietyof cheeses and fresh veggiesto see who can make thebest twist on an ooey-gooey melted favourite: grilled cheese sandwiches!

programme.title: The Sticker Chart
programme.desc: Sid wonders, who needs charts anyway? After a day of investigating, Sid learns that charts are great science tools that help you compare and contrast all kinds of cool stuff like snacks, pets and even chores!

programme.title: The Rolie Polie
programme.desc: At school, he discovers an amazing science tool: the magnifying glass! Sid and his friends explore their world using the magnifying glass to make things look bigger, like freckles on their skin, little pebbles and rolie polie legs!

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: No Blueberry Is an Island
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does, so they can prepare accordingly—they see Strawberry wearing a diving mask and snorkel in the cafe, and race to the lake to practice scuba diving, not knowing she was only slicing onions.

programme.title: Where the Berry Breeze Blows
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here! She insists they can build a copy of “Berry Breezy Bay” resort on Berry Bitty Lake, a duplicate down to the last detail.

programme.title: Foods that Fuel
programme.desc: Fill'er up! When Avery needs to up his energy, he discovers that sugary sports drinks can't beat the boost he gets from his home made Power Smoothies and Awesome Fuel Bars. Lily hits the ice with an Olympic gold-medal hockey player and finds out what happens when you try to run on empty. Will the right snack get her back on track? Lily and Avery head back to the kitchenfor a batch of the ultimate, high- octane meal: a new take on traditional spaghetti & meatballs.

programme.title: Foods that Crunch
programme.desc: It's crunch time! Lily fights soggy cereal witha crunchy batch of her very own granola and learns the history behind crunchy breakfast cereals with History Buff. Avery visits an apple orchard, where he meets an apple expert and learns how apples get from the tree to your local grocery store. Avery and Lily team up to make homemade oven-baked chips, and use their Crunch-o-meter to find out which kind of healthy chip is the King of Crunch!

programme.title: Enough with the Seashells!
programme.desc: At school, he discovers an amazing science tool: the magnifying glass! Sid and his friends explore their world using the magnifying glass to make things look bigger, like freckles on their skin, little pebbles and rolie polie legs!

programme.title: The Whale Episode
programme.desc: At school he learns a great new way to measure just about anything using the method of non-standard measurement! Sid learns how to accurately measure things with shoes, blocks, and even people!

programme.title: Tarzan and Jane
programme.desc: Baby Tarzan is rescued from a plane crash by the gorilla, Kala, and brought to a Shaman who treats Tarzan's injuries with a mix of native medicines and experimental science - saving Tarzan's life and giving him supernatural animal powers in the process. Tarzan is returned to Kala and remains in the jungle, defending animals from poachers, hunters and other threats. As a teenager, Tarzan is discovered by an expedition team from London, paid for by his billionaire grandfather. It is during this expedition where Tarzan meets Jane, and they become fast friends. Later, a series of mishaps takes him to London, reuniting Tarzan not only with his long lost family, but Jane as well. It is here where Tarzan and Jane learn to navigate the “urban jungle” of London, and uncover a dastardly plot to steal and sell exotic animals to the highest bidder! It is up to our heroes to figure out who is behind this sinister deed, and return the animals to their rightful homes in the jungle.

programme.title: Mackenzie Turner Roblox
programme.desc: Roblox fanatic Mackenzie Turner is known for her comedic and exuberant Brookhaven and Adopt Me videos!

programme.title: Denis
programme.desc: Meet Denis, the gaming superstar who takes on obbys – and builds his own – within Roblox and Minecraft!

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Onyx Family
programme.desc: Onyx Family is best known for their spooky skits, starring the Onyx Kids: Shiloh, Shasha, Sinead, and Shalom.

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Chota Shark
programme.desc: Chota Shark and his friend Crabo have adventures at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: I, Elvis Riboldi
programme.desc: The adventures and misadventures of an energetic, scatterbrained, impulsive, reckless and slightly destructive boy, ELVIS RIBOLDI.

programme.title: Nate is Late
programme.desc: Nate and Malika arrive to school late every morning because something amazing always happens on the way - not that the principal ever believes them.

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Ben & Hairy
programme.desc: Ben wakes up one morning to find he has a Yeti in the house and brings him to work hoping none of the guys will notice and you know, it pretty much works.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: The Man of Steel fights a mad scientist who is destroying Metropolis with an energy cannon.

programme.title: Fizzy's Lunch Lab
programme.desc: Professor Fizzy prepares food and teaches about nutrition, diet and physical activity.

programme.title: Let's Game: Pile Up! / Golf Gang
programme.desc: The Kabs family must work as a team to progress in Pile Up! PEGI Rating: 3. / Theo plays Golf Gang where it is all about finishing mini-golf holes QUICKLY! PEGI Rating: 3.

programme.title: Challenge DanTDM: Super Monkey Ball Banana Mania
programme.desc: Will DanTDM and Sophie go bananas playing Super Monkey Ball Banana Mania? PEGI Rating: 3.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood: (Celebrating the Arts) Appreciating All Kinds of Art
programme.desc: It's the Neighborhood of Make-Believe Arts Festival and all the neighbours are finding their own ways to express themselves. Mister Rogers encourages his "television friends" to appreciate the wide va

programme.title: Urban Tails: MISS MABLE / I'M THE SMOOTH NEWT / THE NATTER-TRACK / HYENA TIME! / THE PINE RHYME / MUR-MUR-MUR-MURATION!
programme.desc: MISS MABEL, the Eurasian MAGPIE, is one of the world's most intelligent creatures, she can even recognize herself in the mirror! / Don't get it twisted, DR NEWTON ain't no lizard he is a sleek stylish SMOOTH NEWT who likes the quiet life of slow-moving waters. / MC JACKY T is a rare NATTERJACK TOAD with a big voice! / HYPA HYENA, the cool spotted hyena from sub-saharan Africa, invites us to laugh along with her as we learn cool hyena facts. / The size of a house cat, LIL' P is a funky phat PINE MARTEN on the rise! On her track “The Pine Rhyme” she lets us know that she adores feasting on fruit, insects, small animals too, BUT her favourite food are bilberries, whose blue colouring turns her poop blue!!! / SIR FEATHAZ & LADY FEATHAZ are noisy and gregarious COMMON STARLINGS. They show us that they are very sociable birds, experts at mimicry and of course experts at mesmerizing aerial displays.

programme.title: Super Sportlets: Yo-Yo Hero
programme.desc: The Super Sportlets get the best of a young bully working with Rudy Rude by building him up instead of tearing him down.

programme.title: Transformers Rescue Bots: Double Villainy
programme.desc: Griffin Rock's most dastardly villains team up in a plan to kidnap the Rescue Bots and destroy the island.

programme.title: Bakugan Armored Alliance: Awesome Brawlers Training Camp, Part 1
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers head to a training facility owned by Kasami International to prepare for the Bakugan Battle League Los Volmos. But once the gang figures out they will all be competing against each other for the same title, the team building retreat doesnt go as planned.

programme.title: Krewcraft: Opening our first restaurant in Krewcraft!
programme.desc: We create a local restaurant in Krew Town!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V!: A Con's Game
programme.desc: Zuzu goes deck-to-deck against Sergey, an ex-con who's looking to X out the competition!

programme.title: Battles: Deep Sea Fishing Battle 2
programme.desc: We caught some HUGE fish! 350lb Marlin and so many more. Plus Sparky's worst day ever?!

programme.title: Hero 108: Pitched Battle of the Air Force
programme.desc: Highroller and his minions attack Big Green, led by an enormous Black Dragon, but First Squad uses Woo's new machine to create their own dragon who manages to fend off the attack.

programme.title: Wild Grinders
programme.desc: Lil Rob and Meaty go on a family camping trip, determined to find Big Foot. They do find the mythical creature, only to discover he's a bit down about his life.

programme.title: Wild Grinders
programme.desc: Denise has a mad crush on the boy who works - and skates - at the taco truck. She drives Lil Rob crazy until he agrees to teach her how to skate so she can finally get his attention.

programme.title: Pet Alien: The Bride of Gumpers / The Thing on the Corner
programme.desc: Gumpers' pre-selected bride is coming to Earth! Is there enough time to turn the belching, scratching, smelly alien into a new man? and more...

programme.title: Jar Dwellers SOS
programme.desc: A camping trip to cure Barkas sleepwalking goes awry when he is inhabited by a colony of birds.

programme.title: Jar Dwellers SOS
programme.desc: Sophie's plan to study the Jar Dwellers winter growth nearly comes unstuck at the ice skating rink.

programme.title: Heroes of Goo Jit Zu: Gooing The Distance!
programme.desc: The Heroes of Goo Jit Zu have teamed up with the newly transformed Dino Goo Heroes to take on the malevolent dinosaur villain, Shredz! Shredz is collecting fossils and dinosaur bones to transform them into a Dino Goo army using the Goo meteor to take over the planet. Can the Heroes of Goo Jit Zu battle the army and stop Shredz's evil plan?

programme.title: Road Rangers: Who Are You Going To Call / Sawyer's Folly / Road Ranger had a Farm
programme.desc: Whenever there is any trouble that one can't handle, the Road Rangers be come the savior. They team up to control and manage the critical situations around the car cartoon town. Have fun while watching this super cool cartoon show for kids./ Sawyer, the tow truck, is on a holiday watch how he enjoys his holiday while the rest of his friends work. Instead of helping his friends in need he continuous to enjoy his mini vacation. Enjoy as Sawyer learns a huge lesson on being selfish. / It's so interesting to know that Road Rangers too had a farm with so many cute animals around. Watch this lovely animal song for kids and babies and have a wonderful time singing along to our version of the old classic kids songs like Abc, numbers, colors, shapes, phonics and more with their favorite friends.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny offers to help out an injured Twyla by waiting tables at the café, but soon gets in over his head. Alexis and Moira make a plan to have lunch, despite the fact that they're both anxious about spending time alone together. David and Stevie try to figure out the boundaries of their three-way relationship with Jake.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny decides to buy a new car, and he and Moira craft an increasingly elaborate ruse to avoid getting gouged by the dealership. David accompanies Stevie as she says goodbye to her great-aunt, and confronts her own mortality in the process. Alexis and Ted negotiate the rules of their professional relationship when Ted receives a gift from a female client.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: As the new owner of the motel Stevie is in over her head, and Johnny and Moira employ different strategies to discourage Stevie from selling. Meanwhile, Alexis drives a stressed-out David to his driving test, and Alexis finds herself in the unusual position of coaching her older brother.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny innocently rents rooms to a local businesswoman looking to meet clients from a nearby conference, but must do damage control when he learns more about the nature of the woman's business. David helps Moira tape an audition for a horror film, but has trouble keeping his feelings about the script to himself. Alexis convinces Ted that a live stream bunny cam will help advertise the vet clinic, but the discreet camera ends up advertising more than expected.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie visit a nearby golf course to pitch a package deal with the motel, but Johnny becomes distracted by his desire to play a round of golf. After agreeing to attend Twyla's murder mystery party, Moira must help her recruit other guests. Alexis entertains a suggestion from Ted to go back to school.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: When David contemplates starting a new business in town, Moira uses her seat on Town Council to protect her son's interests. Alexis discovers high school isn't as easy as it used to be. Johnny reluctantly offers romantic advice to the hapless baker Ivan, in return for help with the motel's continental breakfast.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David gets flustered when Ray's assistant Patrick tries to help him set up his business. Johnny is called before Alexis' teacher, but has trouble mounting a defence against the academic charges. Moira's hospitality skills are put to the test when she's forced to deal with a high-maintenance motel guest.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Roland and Moira attend a conference of regional town councillors in Elmdale, and score a major coup for Schitt's Creek. However, the ensuing celebration leads to an awkward encounter the following morning. Meanwhile, Johnny and Jocelyn become concerned that their spouses are keeping secrets from them. As David and Patrick prepare the store for opening, David becomes jealous of Alexis's flirting with Patrick.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David's photographer ex-boyfriend Sebastien arrives in town to do a photo series on Moira, but she soon realizes his intentions might be less than complimentary. Meanwhile, David confronts the failure of his and Sebastien's relationship. Johnny and Roland attend Bob's poker night, and attempt to turn the tables on Bob and Gwen after realizing they might be conspiring to cheat. Alexis accompanies Ted to a seniors' dance, and begins to reevaluate her relationship with him.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.sub-title: If Women Had To Give Birth
programme.desc: Kate hires help to launch her new endeavour, while hiding her health problems from Nathan. Anne attempts to permanently make things right with Lionel, and Frankie hosts her first family dinner in her new home. Ian's meeting with producers is interrupted by an emergency.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Anne and Lionel's commitment ceremony gathers everyone to celebrate, but one of the guests makes a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: In the wake of Nathan's infidelity, Kate gets her life back on track with a new apartment, a new business and a new baby.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate forges a dubious but profitable new business relationship. Disappointed by a court decision, Anne takes matters into her own hands, and channels her rage into a good cause. An old friend tracks down newly rich Frankie with a request.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate takes one for the team and represents an unsavoury client with deep pockets. Forrest's thirst for alone time with Kate becomes a family affair. Anne's new job presses buttons she didn't know she had. Frankie plays financier and Jenny makes some new friends.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: While pursuing new business, Kate confronts an old foe. When Alice decides she's ready to take the subway alone, Anne takes anti-pervert training into overdrive. Frankie finds out Bianca has big life plans and decides to help.

programme.title: Jeff Big Daddy Wayne
programme.desc: Comedian Jeff Wayne was dubbed “Big Daddy” by Billy Crystal and Robin Williams on an HBO Comic Relief show. The moniker has stuck to a guy who's been part of the stand-up comedy scene for a long time. He's toured all over the world, several times in Europe. The Norwegian Newspaper “Sondags B.A.”, described him as having “amazing audience communication, and ferociously funny!”

programme.title: Dave Burleigh
programme.desc: Comedian and Impressionist Dave Burleigh's star is on the rise. His uncanny ability to impersonate just about anyone landed him the starring role as Charlie Sheen in "Not Another Celebrity Movie." Burleigh's multiple characters, voices, and impressions were showcased on Season 7 of America's Got Talent, where he became a fast favorite of both judges and fans alike. Judge Howard Stern said, "You have an excellent command of the stage." Fellow comedian and judge Howie Mandel added, "Your impressions were spot on." Burleigh's laid back and easy going style and persona on stage contrasted with his unique facial and body expressions are guaranteed to leave audiences amazed and impressed. As a two-time finalist in the San Francisco Comedy Competition, Burleigh now shares the first runner-up spot with past participant comedy legends like Robin Williams, Ellen DeGeneres, Marc Maron, Dane Cook and Kevin Pollak. With numerous television, podcast and radio appearances, prestigious publications like Rolling Stone are talking, "Burleigh has the trappings of a soon to be comedy star!" This talented, singer, musician, actor, comedian and host tours the world over 36 weeks a year and headlines all the major casinos in Las Vegas. Make sure to catch Dave's show at a theater or comedy club near you, as he will no doubt, leave you with a lasting impression.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Tommy's unique mixture of original material delivered in a classic style has given him the opportunity to do more shows and be seen by more people live than just about any other comic on the planet.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Tom has been profiled in People magazine, called "gut-busting hilarious" by The New York Times, and given a perfect 4-star rating by the New York Post. He's been featured on radio shows from Hollywood to Dollywood, including "Bob&Tom", Johnboy & Billy "BillHandel" and "Drew&Mike". Chances are you also know Tom as the star of CMT's hit comedy series, "Mabe in America", or have watched one of his popular viral videos. With more than 50-million views on YouTube, Tom is one of the most downloaded people on the planet. People love Tom's stories about coping with life's challenges, ranging from a child with a microscopic attention span to a family vacation in a minivan that takes a wrong turn. His original songs, stories, and videos make for a night out you will remember for years.

programme.title: Mike Siegel
programme.desc: Mike Siegel is a stand-up comedian, TV host, and actor. For nine years, he hosted TBS network's TBS Movie EXTRA and has hosted numerous other network shows including HGTV's If Walls Could Talk and What You Get For the Money, GSN Live on the Game Show Network, and The Next GAC Star on GAC. Along with numerous appearances as a panelist on E! network's hit show Chelsea Lately, Mike has performed stand-up comedy on many television shows, including Last Comic Standing (NBC), The Late Late Show (CBS), Late Friday (NBC), Comedy Showcase with Louie Anderson (NBC), Stand-up, Stand-up (Comedy Central), and Friday Night (NBC). Mike's also been seen on the small screen as an actor. He was a recurring guest star on the CBS drama JAG, and had supporting roles in Mike and Molly (CBS), Rules of Engagement (ABC), 24 (FOX), Prison Break (FOX), Better Off Ted (ABC), Less Than Perfect (ABC), Eve (UPN), Strong Medicine (Lifetime), Andy Richter Controls the Universe (FOX), and Sabrina (WB).

programme.desc: San Diego native Jesse Egan jokes about hitting on women in a smart car, hippie drive-bys, and the gluten free craze.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: The King Of Queens writer Dennis Regan comes swinging hard with his quick wit and flawless delivery. The laughs just keep on coming in "Dennisland".

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy

programme.desc: When a chain of volcanic eruptions rips through Europe, the enormous ash cloud blocks out the sun, plunging the continent into a new ice age. An American couple must find their kids and get them out of Paris before it freezes over.

programme.title: The Little Mermaid
programme.desc: In this animated adventure, a mermaid princess makes a deal with a sea witch to become human. As she explores the surface world, she must choose between her new life and her underwater kingdom

programme.title: 5-Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: A beautiful island's aquatic life faces a new terror: the 5-Headed Shark, a demented starfish-shaped monster threatening Puerto Rico's beaches

programme.title: Ice Sharks
programme.desc: As scientists study the effects of climate change on marine life under Arctic ice, a new breed of shark breaks through, forcing the scientists to fight back.

programme.title: Buster's Mal Heart

programme.title: A Boy Called Sailboat
programme.desc: A family finds hope in their extraordinary son named Sailboat when a personal gesture awakens a global desire.

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) is a young FBI agent who is given a difficult assignment: spy on his mother (Meg Ryan) and her boyfriend (Antonio Banderas) who is suspected of leading a gang of art thieves.

programme.desc: When gruff and independent Candy meets her stubborn birth mother, will the two manage to open their hearts?

programme.title: Transsiberian
programme.desc: A Transsiberian train journey to Moscow becomes a thrilling chase of deception and murder.

programme.desc: After an ex-cop (Michael Rooker, "Guardians of the Galaxy") finds himself caught up in a battle between Japanese mobsters and local thugs, he discovers that he was framed by a corrupt cop.

programme.desc: The world's top thieves join forces to pull off the heist of a lifetime. When they find themselves pursued by a renowned detective, they'll have to take their game to the next level. Starring Andy Lau ("Infernal Affairs") and Jean Reno. Subtitled.

programme.title: The Kardashians: Reality Royalty
programme.desc: Dolly Parton is one of the most iconic singer-songwriters of all time. From her humble beginnings - one of 12 children living in a shack in Tennessee - Dolly has not only conquered the Country music scene, but made her mark on the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Crypto Farmers
programme.desc: Can you make money from manure? Farms are struggling to get by in this modern world. Farmers are forced to diversify their income steams in order to survive. With a remarkable new invention from a young entrepreneur farmers in rural Wales are now heating up piles of cow manure to power crypto mining rigs.

programme.title: When The LAPD Blows Up Your Neighborhood
programme.desc: Tensions rise on a busy street as news organizations and local residents witness an extremely volatile situation turn into a literal powder keg. A DOC+ Original.

programme.title: Mala Onda
programme.desc: Farm animals are being killed all across Puerto Rico and no one knows what's going on. The animals are found with two circular incisions, but no blood. Experts from different backgrounds, farmers who lost animals, and eye witness's explain what they think is happening. Is the Chupacabra a symbol of destruction or a cause for unity? A DOCUMENTARY+ Original film.

programme.title: The Sentence Of Michael Thompson
programme.desc: In 1994, Michael Thompson was arrested for selling three pounds of cannabis and was sentenced to 42 to 60 years in prison. He is the longest serving non-violent offender in the history of Michigan and he is finally up for clemency. A DOCUMENTARY+ original.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses
programme.desc: With over 100 million albums sold, the world's most dangerous band returns for this historic Sin City takeover! Legendary Rock Band Guns N' Roses have taken the desert by storm and laid claim on Las Vegas' Hard Rock Casino. This absolute ambush on the city of sin, captured in High Definition, puts you in the best seat in the house for an electrifying once in a lifetime live concert performance. Filmed during GNR's Appetite For Democracy residency at The Joint in November 2012, celebrating twenty-five years of "Appetite for Destruction"and four years of "Chinese Democracy", in this elaborate Vegas style production featuring Rock Icon Axl Rose at the top of his game with his current lineup performing some of GNR's biggest hits including "Welcome To The Jungle", "Sweet Child Of Mine", "Mr Brownstone", "November Rain", "Chinese Democracy", "Knockin On Heaven's Door", "Nightrain", 'Civil War", McCartney's "Live And Let Die", "Paradise City", and many more hard rockin hits! This is the first live concert release from Guns N' Roses with it's newest lineup, since Use Your Illusion II in 1992 with GNR's original members. Sin City will never be the same.

programme.title: Lady Gaga
programme.desc: Lady Gaga's performance at the iTunes Festival in London on September 1, 2013 marks the superstar's first full concert since the The Born This Way Ball. It is an eight song set containing the world premiere of seven tracks from her fourth album, ARTPOP: "Aura" "MANiCURE" "Artpop" "Jewels N' Drugs" ft. T.I., Too $hort and Twista "Sexxx Dreams", "Swine" and "I Wanna Be With You", a song that transformed into "Dope" for ARTPOP. During the concert, captured stunningly in HD, Gaga says that she's "a bit like Dorothy right now." The stage is her Kansas, the crowd is her family, and their reunion is pure magic. Lady Gaga, her dancers, and her band traverse through visual and musical themes of love, sex, violence, beauty, danger, empowerment, hustle, lust, and above all ART. Throughout, Gaga lays her heart bare for the audience and the cameras with every note sung and every word spoken.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: Explore Quebec City, the Eastern Townships and Montreal with host Darley Newman. Dive into the New France Festival and First Nations culture in Quebec City, nature and adventure cycling through the treetops in the Eastern Townships, and cuisine and history with a food tour in Montreal.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.sub-title: İstanbul, Antalya & the Aegean Coast in Türkiye
programme.desc: Explore history, culture and cuisine in İstanbul, Antalya and along Türkiye's Aegean Coast. See the top sights in İstanbul and enjoy a behind the scenes look at old and new architecture and archeological sites, ranging from Side and Hagia Sofia to Galataport İstanbul, the world's first underground cruise terminal.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: Discover İstanbul, Cappadocia and Anatolia in Türkiye with host Darley Newman and local experts. Visit underground cities and go hot air ballooning amid Cappadocia's magical landscapes. Learn from archaeologists about the megalithic structures being uncovered at Göbeklitepe in the Southeastern Anatolia Region of Turkey.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: Darley explores history and nature in and around Santa Fe, New Mexico. She rides the new Sky Railway and talks to its creator, George R.R. Martin of Game of Thrones. Join her to discover diverse glamping, arts at the International Folk Art Market and New Mexican cuisine and wellness with a trip to the spa.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: Darley shares history, food, and art in and around Santa Fe, New Mexico. Learn about Georgia O'Keeffe's life at Ghost Ranch from a cowboy who grew up with her. Explore art along Canyon Road and at Origami in the Garden along the Turquoise Trail National Scenic Byway.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: Darley Newman shares how to get the most out of your visit to France's renowned wine region, including archaeological marvels, historic landmarks, cultural treasures—and multiple wine tastings. She explores Bordeaux on a river cruise, taking excursions via retro sidecar and to survey wine and cuisine from across the region.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: World-class wine, medieval villages, museums and markets, the Bordeaux region of France is truly a feast for the senses. Darley cruises rivers and explore villages to reveal history around every scenic turn. Discover the quaint wine hills of Saint-Émilion along the pilgrimage route to Santiago de Compostela and the history of winemaking at La Cité du Vin.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: From Delaware's first settler to the du Pont mansions and a historic fort, Darley discovers American history in and around Wilmington. She shares where to get great local beer and dine at a James Beard Award-nominated restaurant. Join her in exploring the charming colonial town of New Castle and opulence at Nemours Estate, Winterthur and Hagley Museum & Library.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: One of the Seven Natural Wonders of the World—all other great wilderness areas are compared to this vast savannah. Wildlife numbers are awesome, but nothing like the numbers of the great migration. Journeys places you in the midst of this natural phenomenon where predator and prey are on a march for survival.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: The name alone conjures up mysterious and exotic images. The architecture and backstory to this once powerful independent kingdom, is both amazing and horrifying. Outside the city, Zanzibar earns its “Spice Island” nickname due to the huge plantations that grow everything to make your cooking flavorful. Journeys final stop is to visit the highly endangered Red Colobus monkeys. Learn why these human-like primates eat dirt for survival.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Safari 101: Tips for a Successful Adventure
programme.desc: All the essentials for going on, and having a successful safari are covered before our host gets a very special challenge—to find at least half of the “Big Twelve” on one safari drive. Four hours and six (6) very special animals—can he do it using his own rules for a successful safari?

programme.title: Business Issues
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou deal with a terrible boss and his instigating employees. Next, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah deal with a debtor with issues when they take possession of a taco truck. And Finally, Matt, Lou, and Sonia take on a big repo at a dealership and come out with six cars.

programme.title: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: First, a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber. Then, the duo go out again to try to repo a car from a slap-happy debtor, but unfortunately the car has a boot on it. And finally, Froy, Matt, Lyndah, and Sonia head out to the ranch to repo a tractor from some pushy ranch hands.

programme.title: Hidden Cars and Higher Powers
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get some help from a friendly gardener that lead them to discover a car hidden in the backyard. Next, Matt and Froy go on another repo to repossess from a preacher that believes it would be blasphemy to repo his car. And finally, cops arrive in the middle of what may be Matt and Froy's last repo. Lou has to swoop in and smooth out the situation.

programme.title: Rolling Away
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill and onto the flatbed. And later, Matt and Froy head out on a repo for a BMW, but when the camera guy refuses to leave the car and Matt's lunch starts to get to him, things go terribly wrong in what could be the worst repo in the history of EGA Recovery.

programme.title: Matt's Back
programme.desc: Froy and Mike, the new guy, repo a car at a paintball range. When the scene gets out of control, Matt swoops in out of nowhere and saves the day. Then, Sonia and Froy repo a high-end luxury sedan from a snooty pair of Brits in the high-rent district. Finally, Matt and Lou head to a dangerous job with Matt's biggest... and smallest fan.

programme.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia repo a compact sedan from a trio of gun-wielding, bottle-breaking gangsta gals. Then, Matt and Froy get some fast food when they deal with an irate burger-slinger who won't honor Matt's order for his car. Finally, Sonia and Froy come face-to-face with a small time hustler and a gaggle of ladies in his employ.

programme.title: Strapped on the Court
programme.desc: Matt and Froy have to choose between the job and their lives when they're confronted by a dozen gun-toting basketball players. Then, Lou and Sonia have to crash a night-time family reunion to get their car. And finally, Lou and Lyndah think they are going to repo a Chevy van from wounded veterans, but the veterans aren't what they seem.

programme.title: Role-players and Blade Swayers
programme.desc: Lou, Matt, and Froy get interrupted on a routine job by a registered owner with an unregistered blade. Then, Matt and Froy head out to the country to reclaim a Prius from a quintet of socially maladapted role-players.

programme.title: Caught with Their Pants Down
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy's relationship takes a strange turn on a repo that puts them face-to-face with two strangers caught with their pants down. Then, Lou and Lyndah head to a remote ranch where they confront a duo of indecent roughnecks. And finally, pool cues and go jacks go flying when Froy, Matt, and Lou visit a local pool hall.

programme.title: Honor Rolling Away
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah find themselves at a local University trying to reclaim a car from a not-so-honorable honor roll student with a squeaky voice. Then, Matt and Sonia are tasked with snagging a tricked-out race car from two vested thugs armed with golf clubs. Finally, Lou and Sonia head to a fancy part of town to repo an Escalade from a young professional and his unsupportive wife.

programme.title: Tazed and Amazed
programme.desc: Matt and Froy need to call in the cops to help out with an inebriated old-timer armed with a tazer. Then, on a journey for a Journey, Lou and Froy battle with a bowler. And finally, Froy and Lyndah deal with a back peddling super-sized owner of a Nissan Altima.

programme.title: Intoxicated Marina Idiots
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia are on a hunt for a 2007 Porsche & a 2008 Audi from the same drug dealing debtor. Next, Matt and Froy pry a truck from a group of intoxicated idiots at a marina. And finally, Matt and Lou hit up an upscale Glendale neighborhood to scoop up a BMW from a shoe throwing rich couple.

programme.title: Playing the Role
programme.desc: First, Lou devises a plan to have Froy and Sonia pose as house buyers, and a happy married couple, meanwhile Matt and Lou will hook and book. Then, Matt and Froy wrangle with an out-of-work actor who's lost track of the line between his identity and his latest role. Finally, Froy and Lyndah need to figure out how to get a car from an angry owner, and the competing repo company that got to the job first.

programme.title: Broken Bones and Broken Phones
programme.desc: First, Froy, Lou, and Matt wrestle a group of body builders when going after a Jeep Commander. And finally, Froy learns why you should never text and not drive to pick up Sonia, because she breaks his phone in two.

programme.title: Climate Action, Now!
programme.desc: Get inspired to save the world with these dedicated minds and leaders tackling one of the biggest threats against modern civilization: climate change. 1) Whatever happened to the hole in the ozone layer? | Stephanie Honchell Smith 2) Climate change isn't a distant threat -- it's our reality | Selina Neirok Leem 3) How to provide cooling for everyone -- without warming the planet | Rachel Kyte 4) How do wind turbines work? | Rebecca J. Barthelmie and Sara C. Pryor 5) How to find your voice for climate action | Fehinti Balogun 6) The intended consequences of helping nature thrive | Ryan Phelan

programme.title: Art of the Future

programme.title: The Future of Cities

Here's how they can fix it | Angel Hsu 3) You don't have to leave your neighborhood to live in a better one | Majora Carter 4) The material that could change the world... for a third time | TED-Ed 5) How to transform sinking cities into landscapes that fight floods | Kotchakorn Voraakhom 6) How do self-driving cars "see"? | Sajan Saini
